zh.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters是Henry d'Armentiers和Alice Picot的女兒，出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾。她於1277年與Gerard de L'Isle在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1261年住在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。她去世於1318年在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters是Henry d'Armentiers和Alice Picot的女儿，出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾。她于1277年与Gerard de L'Isle在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1261年住在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。她去世于1318年在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters was born in Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Henry d'Armentiers and Alice Picot. She married Gerard de L'Isle in 1277, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom in 1261. She died in 1318, in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters est née à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Henry d'Armentiers et Alice Picot. Elle a épousé Gerard de L'Isle en 1277, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1261. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters wurde in Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Henry d'Armentiers und Alice Picot geboren. Sie hat 1277 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England Gerard de L'Isle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1261 hat sie in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1318 in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters è nata il nel Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Henry d'Armentiers e Alice Picot. Lei sposato Gerard de L'Isle nel 1277, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1261. Morì nel 1318, nel Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice d'ArmentersはイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでHenry d'ArmentiersとAlice Picotの娘として生まれた。1277年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでGerard de L'Isleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年にはイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女は1318年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters(은)는 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Henry d'Armentiers(와)과 Alice Picot의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1277년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Gerard de L'Isle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1261년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters nasceu em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Henry d'Armentiers e Alice Picot. Ela casou-se com Gerard de L'Isle em 1277, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1261. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice d'Armenters родилась в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Henry d'Armentiers и Alice Picot. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard de L'Isle в 1277 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1261 году. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.
